case_title: JALETA JONES VS. A-1 CARS & TRUCKS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JALETA JONES IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY EVA VAN NORN, ADVOCATE. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT A-1 CARS & TRUCKS IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY PERRAUM KESHARARZ, SALES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT A-1 CARS & TRUCKS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT JONES, JALETA $1,175.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,220.00, $825.00 STORAGE FEE AT $55.00 PER DAY FOR 15 DAYS. $350.00 RESPOSSESSION FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT A-1 CARS & TRUCKS
